rag_rules: Place assumptions in component type annexes and implementation-level bindings in implementation annexes
Use valid component type scopes for assumptions and guarantees referring to component ports
Use implementation scopes for implementation-level bindings after subcomponents and connections
Avoid using subcomponent ports in component type contracts unless represented through variables or outputs
generic_rules: Use `annex agree {** ... **};` blocks for AGREE contracts
Ensure AGREE expressions match the expected data types
Avoid direct use of AADL properties in AGREE expressions without explicit model exposure
Use exact Boolean expressions only when the port is an AGREE bool in scope
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: Use `int` for integer literals and arithmetic
Use `real` for real literals and arithmetic
anti_patterns: Do not convert Boolean domain values into integers
Do not use subcomponent ports in component type contracts unless represented through variables or outputs
Do not encode AADL timing properties as AGREE expressions without explicit model exposure
Do not use opaque Boolean data range comparisons unless the requirement and AADL data representation provide a numeric scalar
